dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Demonic Cult. A place where only the strong survive, and the weak are discarded like trash. For Cheon Yeo-Woon, the illegitimate son of the Lord, every day was a battle for existence.

dialogue.speaker: Cheon Yeo-Woon
dialogue.line: (Thought) My body still aches from yesterday's 'training.' They call it training, but it's just an excuse to beat the 'Prince of the Orphanage' to a pulp.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRUNT

dialogue.speaker: Cheon Yeo-Woon
dialogue.line: (Thought) I can't give up. Not now. Not ever. Mother... I promised I would survive.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: PANT PANT

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Hidden in the desolate corners of the Cult's vast estate, Cheon Yeo-Woon practiced the basic forms, movements he'd stolen glances of from other cadets. His movements were clumsy, his body weak, but his spirit burned.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Well, well, look what we have here. The 'Prince' is trying to play warrior.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS (CRUNCHING GRAVEL)

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: Still alive, Yeo-Woon? We thought you'd finally learned your place after yesterday's lesson.

dialogue.speaker: Cheon Yeo-Woon
dialogue.line: (Thought) Dammit. It's them again. The sons of the Blade Clan Elder and the Wise Clan Elder.

dialogue.speaker: Cheon Yeo-Woon
dialogue.line: What do you want?

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Oh, nothing much. Just came to remind you of your status. A lowly bastard, born of a servant. You disgrace the Lord's bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: You should just disappear. The Demonic Cult has no place for trash like you.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH (A quick punch)

dialogue.speaker: Cheon Yeo-Woon
dialogue.line: ACK!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD (Yeo-Woon falls)

dialogue.speaker: Cheon Yeo-Woon
dialogue.line: (Thought) They're not even trying. Just playing with their food.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: Still glaring? Fool. You think you can stand against us?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: KICK! CRACK!

dialogue.speaker: Cheon Yeo-Woon
dialogue.line: URGH!

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: Let's teach him a proper lesson this time. One he won't forget.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Blow after blow rained down on Yeo-Woon. His vision blurred, his body screamed in protest, but he refused to cry out. To show weakness was to invite more suffering.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: PUNCH! KICK! PUNCH! (Repeated, muffled)

dialogue.speaker: Cheon Yeo-Woon
dialogue.line: (Thought) Is this it? Am I going to die here? No... I can't... I won't...

dialogue.speaker: Bully 1
dialogue.line: He's barely conscious. Let's finish this.

dialogue.speaker: Bully 2
dialogue.line: Throw him into the Abandoned Well. Let him rot there. No one will find him.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GRAB. DRAG. SCRAPE.

dialogue.speaker: Cheon Yeo-Woon
dialogue.line: (Thought) The Abandoned Well... it's said to be cursed. A place where the Cult's failures are forgotten...

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: PUSH! SPLASH!

dialogue.speaker: Cheon Yeo-Woon
dialogue.line: (Thought) Cold... so cold... I can't breathe...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Plunged into the icy depths, Cheon Yeo-Woon's battered body struggled. Darkness enveloped him, and consciousness began to fade. This was the end. Or was it?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: GURGLE (Water)

dialogue.speaker: Cheon Yeo-Woon
dialogue.line: (Thought) Mother... I'm sorry... I couldn't...

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BZZZZT... (Faint, high-pitched hum)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As his eyes closed, a faint, ethereal blue light pulsed in the darkness, drawing closer to the dying boy.

summary: Cheon Yeo-Woon, the illegitimate prince of the Demonic Cult, endures daily abuse from his half-brothers. After a brutal beating, he is thrown into the cursed Abandoned Well and left for dead, only for a mysterious blue light to appear as he loses consciousness.
